dragonknight.name: Dragonknight
dragonknight.passive: Frenzy: Melee hits grant +2% DMG and +2% Attack Speed (Max 10 stacks). Fades after 3s out of combat.

rareArmor.name: Dragon Scale Plate
rareArmor.desc: +240 Max HP | Heals 5 HP on kill

rareBoots.name: Ethereal Treads
rareBoots.desc: +50 Move Speed | No collision & 50% less DMG while moving

rareGloves.name: Vampiric Grips
rareGloves.desc: +25% Attack Speed | Heal 2% of damage dealt

upgB.name: Aegis Catch
upgB.desc: Catching shield grants a 50% stronger shield

upgB.name: Adrenaline Surge
upgB.desc: Grants brief MS boost and frenzy stacks

upgA.name: Aftershock
upgA.desc: Leaves a zone that detonates after a delay

upgB.name: Shrapnel Landing
upgB.desc: Shoots 4 projectiles outward upon landing

upgA.name: Glacial Breath
upgA.desc: Turns blue and heavily slows enemies

upgB.name: Shatter Breath
upgB.desc: Instantly shatters all enemy shields

spellweaver.name: Spellweaver
spellweaver.passive: Arcane Resonance: Casting spells empowers your next basic attack to explode in an AoE.

rareArmor.desc: +240 Max HP | Basic attacks pierce 1 enemy

rareBoots.desc: +50 Move Speed | No collision & 50% less DMG while moving

rareGloves.desc: +25% Attack Speed | Heal 2% of damage dealt

upgB.desc: Grants a slight personal shield

upgB.name: Frost Departure
upgB.desc: Leaves a small Frost Nova at start position

upgB.name: Echo Blast
upgB.desc: Smaller secondary explosion after 1.5s

ranger.name: Ranger
ranger.passive: Fleetfoot: Continuous movement builds up momentum, granting up to +20% Damage. Stopping clears it.

rareBoots.desc: +50 Move Speed | No collision & 50% less DMG while moving

upgB.desc: Slows target and applies bleeding

upgB.desc: Increases movement speed boost

upgA.name: Parting Shot
upgA.desc: Launches an attack toward nearest enemy

upgB.name: Acrobatics
upgB.desc: Bigger jump range

upgB.name: Rain of Arrows
upgB.desc: Fires +2 additional arrows

nightblade.name: Nightblade
nightblade.passive: Expose Weakness: Periodically marks random nearby enemies. Hitting a marked enemy consumes the mark, dealing massive True Damage and granting a brief MS burst.

rareArmor.name: Nightblade's Cowl
rareArmor.desc: +240 Max HP | 100% Evade for 2s when dropping below 30% HP

rareBoots.name: Ethereal Treads
rareBoots.desc: +50 Move Speed | No collision & 50% less DMG while moving

rareGloves.name: Vampiric Grips
rareGloves.desc: +25% Attack Speed | Heal 2% of damage dealt

upgB.name: Returning Blades
upgB.desc: Daggers instantly return, hitting twice

upgA.name: Toxic Fumes
upgA.desc: Enemies in smoke take heavy continuous poison damage

upgB.name: Thick Fog
upgB.desc: Larger radius; cleanses all negative debuffs on cast

upgA.name: Assassination
upgA.desc: Doubles range; deals 200% more damage to marked targets

upgB.name: Acrobatics
upgB.desc: Grants a second stored charge

upgA.name: Bloodlust
upgA.desc: Popping a Weak Point while active heals 10% Max HP

upgB.name: Chain Reaction
upgB.desc: When a marked enemy dies, they explode and spread the mark

machinist.name: Machinist
machinist.passive: Salvage Economy: 25% chance for enemies to drop Scrap on death. Scrap heals 5 HP and reduces all cooldowns by 0.5s.

rareArmor.name: Hazard Suit
rareArmor.desc: +240 Max HP | Immune to poison and slow effects

rareBoots.desc: +50 Move Speed | No collision & 50% less DMG while moving

rareGloves.name: Vampiric Grips
rareGloves.desc: +25% Attack Speed | Heal 2% of damage dealt

upgB.name: Volatile Casing
upgB.desc: Explodes massively when its duration expires

upgA.name: High Voltage
upgA.desc: Roots enemies for 1s upon entering the field

upgB.name: Arc Network
upgB.desc: Draws lightning to nearby Sentry Turrets

upgA.name: Kinetic Shield
upgA.desc: Gain a heavy shield upon grappling

upgB.name: Decoy Projection
upgB.desc: Leaves a distracting hologram at the launch point

upgA.name: Nuclear Payload
upgA.desc: When Overclock ends, all active turrets violently detonate

upgB.name: Automated Assembly

swordsaint.name: Swordsaint
swordsaint.passive: Flow & Stance: Toggle stances with E. Melee strikes build Flow, boosting Airborne Blade power.

rareWeapon.name: Shattered Reality
rareWeapon.desc: +100% DMG | RMB: Shatter Detonation (Detonate Residual Blades)

rareArmor.name: Saint's Silk Shroud
rareArmor.desc: Taking Handheld damage grants 5% Flow. Airborne damage grants 2.5% Flow + 10% Dodge.

rareGloves.name: Aether Grips
rareGloves.desc: +30% Attack Speed | Basic attacks generate 10% more Flow

upgA.name: Flawless Execution
upgA.desc: Successful parry grants Maximum Flow and resets its cooldown. (Handheld)

upgB.name: Deflecting Storm
upgB.desc: The sweep area is increased and destroying projectiles restores Flow. (Airborne)

upgB.name: Instant Flow
upgB.desc: Deploying grants 30% Max Flow. (Airborne)

upgA.name: Path of Blades
upgA.desc: A phantom blade follows your dash, piercing through enemies. (Handheld)

upgB.name: Surge Reset
upgB.desc: Spatial Swap resets Blade Surge (Q) cooldown. (Airborne)

upgB.name: Piercing Shrapnel
upgB.desc: Shatter Storm knives pierce multiple enemies. (Airborne)
